name: IdsEdwClmLnOvrdDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH main_data AS (SELECT CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_OVRD_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_ID, CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_OVRD_ID, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CHAR) AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CHAR) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_OVRD_EXCD_SK AS EXCD_SK, CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_SK, CLM_LN_OVRD.USER_ID_SK, CLM_LN_OVRD.OVRD_DT_SK AS CLM_LN_OVRD_DT_SK, CLM_LN_OVRD.OVRD_AMT AS CLM_LN_OVRD_AMT, CLM_LN_OVRD.OVRD_VAL_DESC AS CLM_LN_OVRD_VAL_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_OVRD CLM_LN_OVRD INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_EDW_ETL_DRVR DT ON CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_ID=DT.CLM_ID AND CLM_LN_OVRD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=DT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON CLM_LN_OVRD.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CLM_LN_OVRD.CLM_LN_OVRD_SK NOT IN (0,1)), na_data AS (SELECT 1 AS CLM_LN_OVRD_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS CLM_LN_OVRD_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS EXCD_SK, 1 AS CLM_LN_SK, 1 AS USER_ID_SK, '1753-01-01' AS CLM_LN_OVRD_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_OVRD_AMT, NULL AS CLM_LN_OVRD_VAL_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), unk_data AS (SELECT 0 AS CLM_LN_OVRD_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS CLM_LN_OVRD_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS EXCD_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_SK, 0 AS USER_ID_SK, '1753-01-01' AS CLM_LN_OVRD_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_OVRD_AMT, NULL AS CLM_LN_OVRD_VAL_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM main_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM na_data UNION ALL SELECT * FROM unk_data
